parameters.query: UPDATE inventory SET stock_level = stock_level - {{$json.quantity}} WHERE item_name = {{$json.item_name}} RETURNING *;
UPDATE inventory SET stock_level = stock_level + {{$json.quantity}} WHERE item_name = {{$json.item_name}} RETURNING *;
INSERT INTO order_logs (item_name, action, quantity) VALUES ({{$json.item_name}}, {{$json.operation}}, {{$json.quantity}});

parameters.functionCode: return [{ json: { success: true, message: 'Operation completed' } }];
